ground_truth.title: musictheory.net - Lessons
ground_truth.main_content:
musictheory.net provides free online music theory lessons covering introductory and intermediate topics. The lessons are organized into the following sections:

THE BASICS: The Staff, Clefs, and Ledger Lines; Note Duration; Measures and Time Signature; Rest Duration; Dots and Ties; Steps and Accidentals.

RHYTHM AND METER: Simple and Compound Meter; Odd Meter.

SCALES AND KEY SIGNATURES: The Major Scale; The Minor Scales; Scale Degrees; Key Signatures; Key Signature Calculation.

INTERVALS: Generic Intervals; Specific Intervals; Writing Intervals; Interval Inversion.

CHORDS: Introduction to Chords; Triad Inversion; Seventh Chords; More Seventh Chords; Seventh Chord Inversion.

DIATONIC CHORDS: Diatonic Triads; Roman Numeral Analysis: Triads; Diatonic Seventh Chords; Roman Numeral Analysis: Seventh Chords; Composing with Minor Scales; Voicing Chords; Analysis: O Canada.

CHORD PROGRESSIONS: Nonharmonic Tones; Phrases and Cadences; Circle Progressions; Common Chord Progressions; Triads in First Inversion; Triads in Second Inversion; Analysis: Auld Lang Syne.

NEAPOLITAN CHORDS: Building Neapolitan Chords; Using Neapolitan Chords; Analysis: Moonlight Sonata.
with: Our lessons are provided online for free. If they help you, please purchase our apps to support the site.
Learn how to construct the major scale and understand scale degrees.
Learn how a scale's notes form special triads in diatonic chord analysis.
Learn about root motion and circular chord progressions.
Enhanced offline versions of our animated lessons available for iPhone and iPad.
without: Apple, the Apple logo, iPhone, and iPad are trademarks of Apple Inc.
Introductory and intermediate music theory lessons, exercises, ear trainers, and calculators.
